fields.title: Title
fields.groupItinerariesByStop: Group destinations with shared stop names

columns.columnWarning: Columns may be too narrow at this screen width ({nomColWidth}px per column)
columns.disabledInVerticalMode: Column controls are not used in Vertical mode

customLogo.helpText: Enter URL or local path to your organization's logo (e.g., https://example.com/logo.png or /assets/images/logo.png)

hiddenAgencies.title: Agencies
hiddenAgencies.helpText: Click to show or hide an agency

qrCode.title: QR Code
qrCode.helpText: Show a QR code that loads this location in Transit
qrCode.scanPrompt: Want to take these departures with you?
qrCode.scanPrompt2: Scan the code to open in Transit

stopManagement.groupItinerarieshelpText: Combine destinations with the same stop name into a single card (Enabled by default in Board and Vertical modes.)
stopManagement.groupAlwaysOnInBoardMode: Stop grouping is always enabled in Board mode
stopManagement.groupAlwaysOnInVerticalMode: Stop grouping is always enabled in Vertical mode
stopManagement.filterTerminushelpText: At terminal stations, only show the opposite or outbound directions

routeDisplay.showRouteLongNameHelpText: Use written names for any lines that only use an icon as their display name.
routeDisplay.viewModeHelpText: Select between Card mode (default, route-centric landscape view), Board mode (stop-grouped landscape board for closer viewing), or Vertical mode (portrait departure board grouped by stop).

crowding.showCrowdingHelpText: Display occupancy icons on real-time departures (if provided by your transit agency)

scaleMode.helpText: Auto adjusts content size to fit screen. Manual uses a fixed scale.

autoScale.autoColumnsHelpText: Disabled when auto-scale is enabled (requires auto columns)

autoScaleMinimum.helpText: Minimum size when auto-scaling. Lower values fit more routes but reduce readability.

manualScale.helpText: Fixed content scale. Content may scroll if set too large for route count.

location.validationNoRoutes: No routes found at this location
location.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser

mapPicker.title: Choose location
mapPicker.instructions: Drag the pin or click the map to set your location

credits.title: Credits
credits.madeWith:
Made with in Washington, DC by Jason A
Originally developed by Transit in Montreal, QC
credits.links: View on GitHub | Powered by the Transit API

screenWidth.title: Screen too narrow
screenWidth.message: This application is designed for large displays such as monitors and televisions. To view transit departures on your phone, please download the Transit app.
screenWidth.developerMessage: Developers: use toggleWidthCheck() in the console to disable this message

errors.rateLimit: Checking for updates. Retrying in {seconds} seconds...
errors.auth: Can't connect to the Transit API.
errors.backend: Headsign is out of service. Retrying...
errors.generic: Headsign ran into a problem. Retrying...
